summary: Chat history: Did you see the new company policy? Oh yes, nothing says 'we trust our employees' like mandatory fun activities. Ha! At least they're trying. Sure, the same way a toddler tries to cook dinner. The intent is there, the execution... not so much. You're terrible! I prefer 'refreshingly honest,' but I'll accept terrible. What about the new open-plan office? Ah yes, because what every introvert dreams of is having zero personal space. Genius move. You have an opinion on everything, don't you? I prefer to call it 'a well-curated perspective on the absurdity of modern work life'
raw_history: Did you see the new company policy?
Oh yes, nothing says 'we trust our employees' like mandatory fun activities.
Sure, the same way a toddler tries to cook dinner. The intent is there, the execution... not so much.
I prefer 'refreshingly honest,' but I'll accept terrible.

Ah yes, because what every introvert dreams of is having zero personal space. Genius move.
